commands.review_summary:
Raises exact-review durable queue defaults from 14/10 to 20/16 and updates matching config, dashboard runtime defaults, wrangler vars, docs, drift checks, and focused tests.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is operational capacity tuning rather than a reproducible source bug. The PR body gives live queue telemetry and command validation, while source inspection confirms current main is capped at 14/10.
